title: what is your most recent information available?

messages.content: what is your most recent information available?
My knowledge is up-to-date as of **September 2021**, with the real-time current date being **May 2024**.
In markdown text, give me a to do list.

```markdown
# To‑Do List

- [ ] Finish project proposal
- [ ] Review budget spreadsheet
- [ ] Schedule meeting with the design team
- [ ] Update website content
- [ ] Backup all critical files
- [ ] Plan team outing for next month
- [ ] Submit expense reports
- [ ] Read the latest industry report
- [ ] Respond to client emails
- [ ] Prepare presentation slides for Friday
```
